calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David W. Hughes, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Home Assurance Company.
No appearance by defendant Billy Gean Patterson.
Default entered against defendant on April 23, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 30, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 17, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Home Assurance Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dilly Gean Patterson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,321.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,394.92.
Costs - $603.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $21,318.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
